title: Show Cause Notice for cancellation of provisional registration

questions.question: When building a RAG pipeline for legal documents, what are the key trade-offs between chunk size and retrieval quality, and how do you empirically determine the optimal chunk size for your corpus?

In a resource-constrained environment (4-core CPU, single consumer GPU), how do you prioritize and schedule concurrent workloads — such as embedding generation, LLM inference, and OCR — to minimize latency while maintaining throughput?

title: Procedure for disposal of unclaimed / uncleared cargo under section 48 of the Customs Act, 1962, lying with the custodians - regarding
text:
6        Public Notices may be issued for the benefit of the trade, particularly the custodians.

7        Please acknowledge receipt of this Circular.

8        Hindi version will follow.

V.Kezo

Under Secretary to the Government of India

questions.question: A RAG pipeline is returning accurate results but query latency is 8-12 seconds on a 4-core machine. The embedding model runs on CPU and the LLM is on GPU via Vulkan. What is the most likely bottleneck and what is the first diagnostic step?

You have 108,000 text chunks stored in Qdrant and need to add 471 image-only PDFs to the same index. Your CPU tesseract OCR is too slow for production use. What architecture would you use to process these PDFs without blocking the live query path?

title: Corrigendum to Notification No. 93/2004-Customs dated 10.09.2004
text:
17th May, 2005

CORRIGENDUM

In condition (v) of opening paragraph of the Notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Finance (Department of
Revenue) Nos.93/2004-Customs, dated the 10 th September, 2004, published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary), vide
GSR 606(E),  the words & figures  "under rule 18" shall be corrected to read as "under rule 18 (rebate of duty paid on materials
used in the manufacture of resultant product)"

F.NO.605/50/2005-DBK

(H. K. PRASAD)

UNDER SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA

questions.question: Under GST, if a registered supplier provides works contract services for construction of an immovable property to another registered person, what is the applicable GST rate and can the recipient claim Input Tax Credit on such services?

A taxpayer receives a show cause notice under Section 73 of the CGST Act for short payment of tax not involving fraud or wilful misstatement. What is the time limit for issuance of the order, and what is the reduced penalty if the taxpayer pays the full tax demand along with interest before the issuance of the order?
